summary: 59 tests passed, 99.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: get_video_info tool registered at module level with @mcp.tool() decorator
completion_promises.evidence: get_video_info is decorated with @mcp.tool() at module level in src/__main__.py (line 37-38). Test test_tool_is_registered_on_mcp verifies it appears in mcp._tool_manager._tools.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tool accepts video_url: str parameter (YouTube URL or video ID)
completion_promises.evidence: Function signature is get_video_info(video_url: str) -> dict. Test test_accepts_video_url_param inspects the signature and verifies the parameter name and type annotation.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Returns dict with all VideoInfo fields on success
completion_promises.evidence: Success path uses dataclasses.fields(info) to dynamically build a dict containing all VideoInfo fields. Test test_returns_all_video_info_fields iterates over VideoInfo fields and asserts each is present in the response.
All three exception handlers (InvalidURLError, VideoNotFoundError, generic Exception) return the structured error format. Tests verify the exact structure for all three error types.
InvalidURLError handler returns category='client_error', code='INVALID_URL'. Test test_invalid_url_returns_structured_error mocks the exception and verifies the response structure.
VideoNotFoundError handler returns category='client_error', code='VIDEO_NOT_FOUND'. Test test_video_not_found_returns_structured_error mocks the exception and verifies the response structure.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unexpected exceptions -> category: server_error, code: INTERNAL_ERROR, logged with logger.exception()
completion_promises.evidence: Generic Exception handler returns category='server_error', code='INTERNAL_ERROR' and calls logger.exception(). Tests test_unexpected_error_returns_server_error and test_unexpected_error_logs_exception verify both the response structure and logger.exception() call.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Tool docstring describes accepted URL formats for LLM discovery
completion_promises.evidence: Docstring lists all 5 supported URL formats (standard watch, youtu.be, embed, mobile, bare ID) and describes return fields. Tests test_has_docstring and test_docstring_mentions_url_formats verify presence and content.

completion_promises.criterion_text: YouTubeClient instantiated at module level (not inside tool function)
completion_promises.evidence: youtube_client = YouTubeClient() is at module level (line 34) in __main__.py. Test test_youtube_client_at_module_level verifies the attribute exists and is a YouTubeClient instance.
